name: HRA Exemption Calculator India

before.shortDescription: Estimate your monthly and annual HRA exemption in India with RupeeKit. Input salary, HRA, rent, and city type to understand potential tax savings.
before.metaDescription: Use RupeeKit's HRA Exemption Calculator to estimate your tax-exempt House Rent Allowance in India. Input salary, HRA, rent, and city for an estimate.

after.shortDescription: Estimate your potential monthly and annual HRA tax exemption in India with RupeeKit. Input salary, HRA, rent, and city type to understand your possible tax savings.
after.metaDescription: Use RupeeKit's HRA Exemption Calculator to estimate your tax-exempt House Rent Allowance in India. Input salary, HRA, rent, and city for an estimate

changeSummary: Confirmed 'example' is 80-180 words, practical, and mentions estimates.
Verified 'faqs' contains 6-8 items, all conservative and helpful.
